user_query: show me anomaly with albanian passengers on
user_intent_summary: Identify anomalies related to passengers with Albanian nationality across relevant datasets.

datasets.name: tipologia_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset contains nationality codes and counts of alarmed passengers. Filtered to Albanian ('alb') passengers. Grouped by route (departure-arrival airports) to detect route-level anomalies in alarm counts.

datasets.name: allarmi_raw
datasets.rationale: Dataset includes country codes and alarm totals. Filtered to departures from Albania ('alb'). Grouped by route to find anomalous alarm volumes per route involving Albanian passengers.
